criteria.criterion: DBB-001: Chat completions via Engine Registry — brain.js uses resolveModel/modelsForCapability from engine/registry.js
DBB-002: Ollama chat endpoint /api/chat behavior unchanged
DBB-003: brain.js no longer imports getModelPool from config.js
DBB-004: STT resolves via Engine Registry — stt.js uses resolveModel/modelsForCapability
DBB-005: STT no longer imports detect/getProfile from detector/
DBB-006: STT fallback chain via engine registry
DBB-007: TTS resolves via Engine Registry — tts.js uses resolveModel/modelsForCapability
DBB-008: TTS no longer imports hardware profile from detector/
DBB-009: TTS backend switchable via assignments.tts
DBB-010: Dead files removed (LocalModelsView.vue, CloudModelsView.vue, App-old.vue, ConfigPanel.vue, runtime/memory.js)
DBB-011: Duplicate /api/ollama routes removed from api.js
DBB-012: Legacy /api/model-pool endpoint proxied to /api/engines/models with deprecation headers
DBB-013: Deprecation header present on /api/model-pool (X-Deprecated, Deprecation: true)
DBB-014: All existing tests pass — 198 test files, 1193 tests passed, 0 failures
DBB-015: No regression in /v1/chat/completions — code paths use engine registry, tests confirm behavior
